examples: We all have pain in our lives, whether it's the jackhammer snarling across the street, or the sudden wave of anxiety when we get up to give a speech.
If we're really stubborn, he USES a jackhammer.
The construction worker battered away at the concrete with a jackhammer.
It's like trying to do heart surgery with a jackhammer.
We want to use it as a virtual jackhammer.
